title: 🧬 Myth-as-Virus Lattices
name: Myth-as-Virus Lattices
what_it_is: Narrative constructs designed to spread like pathogens—infectious myth units that self-replicate in host minds and environments.
how_to_use: the myth infected her—she now dreams only in its structure
he spreads the tale unknowingly—it codes itself into all who listen
animation_behavior: Myths propagate as fractal networks, characters glitch into narrative loops, visuals overgrow with symbolic strands ---
